# Long Eaton Skips

> Family-run skip hire service in Long Eaton, Nottinghamshire. No VAT on all domestic skip hires — save 20% compared to VAT-registered competitors.

## About

Long Eaton Skips has been serving Long Eaton and surrounding areas since 2015. We are a licensed waste carrier offering domestic and commercial skip hire with transparent pricing and no hidden fees. Because we operate below the VAT registration threshold, we do not charge VAT on domestic skip hires.

## Contact

- Name: Long Eaton Skips
- Phone: 07782 222 906
- WhatsApp: 07470 300 853
- Location: Long Eaton, Nottinghamshire, NG10, United Kingdom
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 07:30–17:30
- Online booking: https://zipskips.co.uk/?location=long-eaton

## Skip Sizes & Pricing

All prices include delivery, no VAT added:

- 5-Yard Skip — £326 (fits ~40–50 bin bags)
- 8-Yard Builders Skip — £386 (fits ~80–90 bin bags)
- 12-Yard Large Skip — £472 (fits ~120 bin bags)

## Services

- [Skip Sizes](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/skips): Compare our 5, 8, and 12 yard skips.
- [Grab Hire](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/grab-hire): Grab lorry service for loose materials — no skip needed.
- [Wait & Load Skip Hire](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/wait-and-load-skip-hire): We bring the skip, wait while you load, and take it away. No permit required.
- [Commercial Skip Hire](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/commercial-skip-hire): Trade waste, construction sites, and business premises.
- [Rubbish Clearance](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/rubbish-clearance): Full clearance service with labour included.

## Service Areas

- [Long Eaton](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/skip-hire/long-eaton): NG10/NG9 — Sawley, Sandiacre, Breaston, Toton, Chilwell, Attenborough.
- [Nottingham](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/skip-hire/nottingham): NG1–NG9 — Beeston, West Bridgford, Arnold, Carlton, Bulwell, Gedling.
- [Derby](https://longeatonskips.co.uk/skip-hire/derby): DE1–DE72 — Spondon, Chaddesden, Chellaston, Allestree, Mickleover, Littleover.

## Booking

Book online at https://zipskips.co.uk/?location=long-eaton or call/WhatsApp directly using the numbers above.
